__fixture_tag__: VENDORED SOURCE SNAPSHOT — peer-reviewed citation, frozen

claim.property: thermal-donor concentration [TD] in CZ Si post-anneal
claim.condition: anneal 450 C / 1 h, oxygen-rich CZ wafer, FTIR or Hall measurement

source.primary: Kaiser & Frisch 1958 Phys. Rev. 112, 1546 — discovery of thermal donors in CZ Si
source.secondary: Bullis 1995 SEMI MF1188 specification; Wijaranakula 1991 J. Electrochem. Soc.
source.citation: Kaiser & Frisch 1958 Phys. Rev. 112, 1546 + SEMI MF1188 (Bullis 1995) — CZ Si thermal donors form at 450 C anneal, [TD] = 10^15 to 10^16 cm^-3

tolerance.basis: thermal-donor formation kinetics vary with [O_i]; literature range spans ~1 decade
